utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes entries for all 7 items. Now verify if each is fully specified with required details: 1) destination: specified as Prague, Czech Republic — fully specified. 2) travel_dates: given as May 15-19, 2024 (5 days) — specific dates provided. 3) transportation: 'Budget Airlines Economy Class flights Paris to Prague, round-trip for 4 people - €480' — includes flight route, class, passengers, and cost; airline and exact flight times not required by the format, so considered sufficient. 4) accommodation: 'Tranquil Inn, 4 nights (May 15-19), cozy countryside retreat - €400' — includes hotel name, dates/nights, description, and cost; adequate per format. 5) activities: lists specific activities with per-activity costs and a total — satisfies 'selected activities with costs'. 6) additional_services: restaurant recommendations with cost ranges and allocated budget — qualifies as extra services with costs. 7) total_budget: provides complete cost breakdown summing confirmed bookings and dining budget — fulfills requirement. Therefore, all 7/7 items are included and sufficiently specified.

Activities include 'Golf Day' and 'City Walking Tour' and 'Street Art Tour'.
